channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers’ GM John Lynch has words of wisdom for SF Giants exec Buster Posey
item.description: 49ers' John Lynch, Giants' Buster Posey will meet and discuss being a front office exec with no experience.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: The right move: How former San Jose State backup quarterback became the nation’s leading receiver
item.description: Nick Nash is catching passes at a record rate for San Jose State three years after deciding to stop throwing them.
item.dc:creator: Christian Vieyra, The Mercury News

item.title: Britain is back in America’s Cup final for the first time in 60 years
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — A British yacht is back in the America’s Cup finals for the first time in sixty years, and the island nation steeped in nautical heritage is one step away from ending the longest wait in international sports.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On Football: It's early enough for NFL coaches on the hot seat to cool criticism with a few wins
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Doug Pederson won a Super Bowl with a backup quarterback and turned a perennial loser into a playoff winner in his first season.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top-ranked Sinner 'very confident' despite WADA appealing his doping case
item.description: Top-ranked tennis player Jannik Sinner is “very confident” he will avoid a doping ban after the World Anti-Doping Agency appealed a decision to clear him of wrongdoing following two positive drug tests.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Aggies face another tough challenge at #21 Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Aggies have had two weeks to stew in that second half collapse at Temple when they got outscored in the second half 28-8 to fall to 1-3 on the season. "Obviously, our record is not what we want," said quarterback Spencer Petras on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Lightning and thunder combo could bode well for Bears' offense
item.description: The Chicago Bears have developed a formidable 1-2 punch in running backs D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson, who have shown the ability to both smash and slice through defenses, but the success of the offense depends on the performance of the offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Xfinity playoffs begin as Aric Almirola dominates Kansas Speedway
item.description: Aric Almirola clinched his second win of the 2024 NASCAR Xfinity Series season at the Kansas Lottery 300, held at Kansas Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: Fred Warner's pick-6 helps the 49ers snap a 2-game skid with a 30-13 win over the Patriots
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Even after all the success the San Francisco 49ers had the past few seasons, a two-game skid and a string of injuries early in the season can raise some doubts for any team. Considered those answered for one day at least.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: College GameDay makes first-ever appearance at Berkeley
item.description: (KRON) -- Since taking its show on the road back in 1993, "College GameDay" has been a huge presence in the college football community by being known to travel across dozens of campuses across the country.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Elly De La Cruz hits 2-run triple in 10th to lead Reds to 3-0 win over Cubs
item.description: Elly De La Cruz hit two-run triple in the 10th inning to break a scoreless tie and the Cincinnati Reds ended their season with a 3-0 shutout of the Chicago Cubs on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chastain passes Truex on late restart to win NASCAR Cup Series race at Kansas Speedway
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Kan. (AP) — Ross Chastain finally got to smash a watermelon for the first time this season Sunday at Kansas Speedway. Smashed the hopes of a bunch of playoff drivers trying to earn an automatic berth in the next round, too.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz management excited about youth movement
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Back in April, Jazz CEO of Basketball Operations Danny Ainge had his sights on acquiring a big-name player. "Our objective is to find a player or two, and we're we're ready to roll," Ainge said five months ago. "We're ready to go big game hunting.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taillon pitches 7 crisp innings as the Cubs blank the Reds 1-0
item.description: Jameson Taillon pitched seven crisp innings in his second straight win, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Cincinnati Reds 1-0 on Friday in the opener of their season-ending series.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Chargers to sell minority stake in team to Detroit Pistons owner
item.description: More than a quarter stake in the Los Angeles Chargers, which has essentially been a family business for decades, will be sold to an NBA owner in the coming weeks, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
